reviews.review_title: Does what it says in the description
reviews.review_description: Delightful program where you can spend time with a bird. The things you can do are a little limited (like in real life) but you can interact with it. It will land on your finger. Probably not an app that you will spend a lot of time in but it is great for a bit of escapism into a nice world with a tame bird.
Does what it says, little birds flying around your room..!!  3 birds to choose from atm.
